review: This large reef print is absolutely stunning. The coral colors have such depth, and knowing it was shot on the artist's own dive in Kaneohe Bay makes it feel truly special. Printed beautifully on heavy matte paper and it arrived rolled in a sturdy tube with a certificate. It's now the centerpiece of my living room. Lorraine even tucked in a handwritten note. Mahalo!

The coral-print canvas tote is even more beautiful in person. The reef illustration is crisp and the canvas is sturdy and holds its shape perfectly. I've been using it at the farmers market every weekend and get compliments constantly. Shipped fast and packed with care. ReefLightByLorraine is the real deal.

Ordered two honu turtle prints as housewarming gifts and both recipients loved them! The composition is serene and the color is true to what you actually see on the reef. Giving 4 stars only because one arrived with a slightly bent corner in the sleeve, but Lorraine responded immediately and offered to send a replacement. Wonderful seller with genuine aloha spirit.

Lorraine's Coral Recovery Series print is extraordinary. The coral nursery photograph I ordered arrived beautifully packaged and framed in natural bamboo, and I hung it the same day. The detail is stunning up close and I love that the sale supports actual reef restoration. Will order again from ReefLightByLorraine!

Bought this ocean-tone notecard set as a gift for my aunt who loves the sea. She was thrilled — the reef and coral photography on each card is gorgeous and the card stock is heavy and high quality. The white envelopes are a nice touch and the whole set arrived quickly. A lovely gift for any ocean lover.

The Kaneohe Bay framed reef print is breathtaking — the coral colors are so vivid and the bamboo frame is a beautiful touch. Arrived perfectly packaged with no damage. Giving 4 stars because one corner of the mat inside the frame had a tiny bubble, but it's barely visible at normal viewing distance. Stunning piece of Hawaii for my living room.

The ocean-tone throw blanket is gorgeous. The coral reef design has this soft deep-blue to seafoam palette that feels perfectly Hawaiian, and it's cozy on the lanai in the evenings. Well made and machine washable. Beautifully packaged and arrived in perfect condition all the way to Portland. Mahalo, Lorraine!

This cauliflower coral print is everything. The turquoise and deep-blue water is exactly as pictured and the coral structure is so crisp. It's the perfect size for the wall above my desk and feels like a little window onto the reef. I've already ordered a second one as a gift. A beautiful piece of Hawaii's living reef.

The reef-safe sunscreen set is excellent. All four tins go on smooth and don't leave a heavy white cast like some mineral sunscreens. Knowing they're non-nano zinc and reef-safe makes them perfect for our dive and beach days. Great packaging, fast shipping, and it's from a marine biologist who actually cares what washes off. Already planning to reorder!

The sunscreen balm tin arrived dented and one side had leaked slightly inside the padded envelope. The product itself seems fine and I appreciate that it's reef-safe, but I was disappointed with the packaging. Lorraine reached out and offered a replacement which I appreciated. The formulation feels good on skin when applied — hopeful the replacement arrives better protected.

Came back for more! The windward tidepool mini print set is exactly what our hallway needed. The four little images — sea star, hermit crab, coral polyps, and a reef fish — make a perfect gallery wall together. The archival lustre paper looks fantastic. Already planning to get a second set as a gift. ReefLightByLorraine never disappoints.

The reef-print tea towels are so beautiful I almost don't want to use them. The ocean-tone reef pattern is a rich blue-green — exactly like the water just past the reef. They're incredibly absorbent and already getting softer after the first wash. The hemming is neat and careful. A daily luxury that brings a little Hawaii into my mainland kitchen.

The coral bommie print is breathtaking — the luminous blues and coral tones are vivid and accurate to what you actually see diving on a healthy reef. The bamboo frame is beautiful and fits perfectly over my dive gear display, and I love that it's signed on the back. A wonderful piece of conservation art.

This large sea turtle print is stunning. The honu gliding along the coral ledge with the soft blue water behind it makes a perfect centerpiece for our entryway. The archival matte paper has a beautiful finish. A wonderful housewarming gift — already fielding questions from guests about where it came from!

The ocean lover's gift bundle is lovely — the reef-safe sunscreen, coral-print pouch, and reef photography notecards all felt thoughtfully chosen and were beautifully packaged, ready to give. Docking one star only because the pouch had a small loose thread, but everything else was perfect and my friend loved it.

My second reef print from ReefLightByLorraine and it's even more gorgeous than the first. The coral garden image is luminous and the print quality is impeccable. It hangs above my desk and brings me joy every single day. Mahalo, Lorraine — your work is truly special.

Bought the ocean-tone notecard set for a friend who loves to write real letters — she has been using them constantly. The reef photography on each card is beautiful and the printing is high quality. The heavy card stock feels lovely and the set arrived quickly. A perfect gift for any lover of the ocean.

Ordered two sets this time! The reef-safe sunscreen tins are a staple for me now — they work well and knowing they're non-nano zinc and reef-safe matters deeply to me. Fast shipping, beautiful packaging. ReefLightByLorraine is my go-to for conscious Hawaiian gifts.

Bought this coral-print tote as a birthday gift for my grandma — she was over the moon. The reef illustration is lovely and the canvas is sturdy and roomy. Arrived exactly as pictured and beautifully wrapped. ReefLightByLorraine always exceeds expectations.

The cauliflower coral print is beautiful — the turquoise water and coral detail are exactly as pictured. Knocking off stars because mine arrived with a small crease near one edge of the sleeve (not visible once framed but still a flaw). Lorraine responded quickly and is sending a replacement. Customer service is excellent even if the packaging slip was disappointing.
